articles.title: Centre lifts restrictions on sale of petrol, diesel from July 1

articles.description: From July 1, commercial users such as transport companies and industries will once again be able to buy petrol and diesel from retail outlets without any quantity limits.

articles.title: Big news for commercial petrol, diesel buyers: India lifts emergency curbs on retail sales from July 1
articles.description: Driven by escalating conflict in the West Asia that threatened global supply chains and raised fears of domestic shortages, the government had barred commercial users from buying fuel at retail stations and capped individual diesel purchases at 200 liters per day per customer or vehicle.

articles.title: Petrol, diesel sale restrictions to end on July 1 as India eases war-time curb
